summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Paint Shop for food truck design studio. All 9 core features tested and working perfectly with real-time preview updates.
passed_tests: All 6 color palette categories load correctly (Classic, Industrial, Vibrant, Earth Tones, Metallic, Pastels)
Color selection with real-time truck preview updates working perfectly
Primary color changes truck body color immediately
Accent color changes stripe, wheel hubs, and trim correctly
All 4 finish types (Matte, Satin, Gloss, Metallic) apply visual effects and update finish info
All 4 texture options (Solid, Brushed Metal, Carbon Fiber, Diamond Plate) functional
Business name input updates truck text in real-time
Custom hex color input works correctly (#ff5722 tested)
Color picker input present and functional
Save Design button exists and is clickable
No error messages found on the page
UI elements properly styled with data-testid attributes for testing
